tasks.prompt: Reminder: UMKC ID Session is in 2 weeks — June 13, 2026. Register at https://kansascitymenssoccer.totalcamps.com/shop/product/622952. Full day $325, half day $225. Check-in 8AM (morning) or 4:30PM (afternoon).

Reminder: UMKC ID Session is in 2 weeks — July 25, 2026. Register at https://kansascitymenssoccer.totalcamps.com/shop/product/622967. Full day $325, half day $225. Check-in 8AM (morning) or 4:30PM (afternoon).

Review Japan MEXT scholarship application timeline for Noah (Class of 2028). Application deadline is May 2027 to Japanese Embassy. Check:
1. Is Noah still interested in Japan as backup option?
2. US college recruiting status (any D1/D2/NAIA offers yet?)
3. If pursuing MEXT: prepare application materials (transcripts, recommendations, entrance exam prep)
4. Contact Japanese Embassy Chicago for official 2027 application guidelines
5. Update international.html page if plans change

Reference documents: JAPAN_RECRUITING_RESEARCH.md, international.html
